TH_RIN-RIN_CHARACTER.cardsModifierDescri: Rin Kaenbyou's cards now appear in rewards and shops.
TH_RIN-RIN_CHARACTER.description:
A cat that resides in flames and rides a cart. She loves collecting corpses.
Skilled at using wraiths and causing fires to defeat enemies.
TH_RIN-RIN_CHARACTER.goldMonologue: [sine]These gold coins... might come in handy...[/sine]
TH_RIN-RIN_CHARACTER.title: Rin Kaenbyou
TH_RIN-RIN_CHARACTER.unlockText: Play a game with [pink]{Prerequisite}[/pink] to unlock this character.
